violations.text: The honey comb guards at open air case were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be thoroughly washed, rinsed and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. honey comb guards at open air case (cardboard observed in areas missing honey comb guard, PIC informed to cease practice) 2. laminate on countertop of cabinet (observed held by tape) New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025

The floors under equipment and shelving have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The wall by the back storage room entrance is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2025
